name: sgs/separator
title: SGS Separator
description: A styleable horizontal divider — line style, responsive width/thickness, colour or gradient, alignment, and an optional centred icon or text label. Replaces core/separator framework-wide.

line.label: Line
line._note: The visible divider — the block ROOT itself when contentMode='none' (a single <hr>, no wrapper — single-semantic-element rule), or each `.sgs-separator__line` flanking span when contentMode is 'icon'/'text' (render.php: one mechanism renders the border-bottom for both shapes, module header). `thickness`/`lineStyle`/`colour` map onto css:border-width/style/color because the visible line IS rendered as a border-bottom (render.php:140-156), not a background bar — no css:background-color member resolves (honest gap: a line has no fill). gradientColourStart/End/Angle are a genuine second fill mechanism (border-image) with no cluster member of their own (Spec 35 vocabulary has no gradient-stop member) — left unclaimed, not force-mapped. No border-radius/box-shadow/max-width/height/gap/aspect-ratio attrs — honest gaps. No `layer` — a line has no children to arrange.

content.label: Content (icon or text)
content._note: Optional centred icon OR text label, shown when contentMode is 'icon'/'text' (render.php:286-332, `.sgs-separator__content`). css:font-size/font-weight/font-style/line-height resolve via the default `content`+suffix convention (contentFontSize/contentFontWeight/contentFontStyle/contentLineHeight). css:color resolves to contentTextColour (the text-mode colour, suffix `TextColour`) — contentIconColour is a SEPARATE icon-mode colour attr with no cluster member of its own (this slot renders either an icon OR text, never both) and surfaces as an orphan. contentIconSize/contentIconSource/contentIconName/contentIconEmoji/contentIconDashicon/contentIconWpIcon are bespoke icon-source controls, also honest orphans. text-transform/text-decoration/text-align/font-family have no content-specific attribute — honest gaps.
